untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental data (earnings deceleration, margin compression, insider selling) and qualitative technician assessment which are not available in the allowed indicator list. Only the price-based condition (within 5% of 52-week high) can be translated using price_pos_20 > 0.95. The early_signals_required threshold of 2/4 conditions cannot be enforced without access to fundamental metrics.
translation_notes: Translated only the quantifiable technical entry condition: price within 5% of 52-week high maps to price_pos_20 > 0.95 (where price_pos_20 represents position in 20-period range; >0.95 approximates being near 52-week highs). Exit conditions use returns to represent the +8% stop loss and -15% profit target. Fundamental conditions (earnings, margins, insider selling) and technician weakness assessment require external data sources unavailable in the indicator set.
